database_final

Robert Fusting

12/9/2022

library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching packages ─────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse 1.3.1 ──
## ✔ ggplot2 3.3.5      ✔ purrr   0.3.5 
## ✔ tibble  3.1.8      ✔ dplyr   1.0.10
## ✔ tidyr   1.2.1      ✔ stringr 1.4.1 
## ✔ readr   2.0.1      ✔ forcats 0.5.1
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
library(ggiraphExtra)
steam_data = read_csv("playtime_steam.csv")
## Rows: 11399 Columns: 5── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (3): title, Genre, Publisher
## dbl (2): user_id, playtime
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
ggplot(steam_data, aes(x=Genre, y=log(playtime))) + geom_boxplot(fill="steelblue") + labs(x="Genre",y="playtime")

# ANOVA in R
steam_genre = aov(log(playtime)~Genre,data=steam_data)
summary(steam_genre)
##                Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## Genre          11   3499   318.1   87.94 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   11387  41189     3.6                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
model.tables(steam_genre, type = "means")
## Tables of means
## Grand mean
##          
## 2.068083 
## 
##  Genre 
##       Action Adventure Fighting   Misc Platform Puzzle  Racing Role-Playing
##        2.043     1.305    1.608  2.813   0.8474  0.625   1.574        1.968
## rep 2992.000   324.000  110.000 27.000 244.0000 83.000 434.000     1611.000
##      Shooter Simulation Sports Strategy
##        1.914      2.262   4.13    2.328
## rep 3151.000    398.000 570.00 1455.000
model.tables(steam_genre, type = "effects")
## Tables of effects
## 
##  Genre 
##        Action Adventure Fighting    Misc Platform Puzzle  Racing Role-Playing
##       -0.0249   -0.7628    -0.46  0.7445   -1.221 -1.443  -0.494     -0.09977
## rep 2992.0000  324.0000   110.00 27.0000  244.000 83.000 434.000   1611.00000
##      Shooter Simulation  Sports  Strategy
##       -0.154      0.194   2.062    0.2594
## rep 3151.000    398.000 570.000 1455.0000
plot(steam_genre)

TukeyHSD(steam_genre)
##   Tukey multiple comparisons of means
##     95% family-wise confidence level
## 
## Fit: aov(formula = log(playtime) ~ Genre, data = steam_data)
## 
## $Genre
##                                diff         lwr          upr     p adj
## Adventure-Action        -0.73787129 -1.10146381 -0.374278758 0.0000000
## Fighting-Action         -0.43511923 -1.03865741  0.168418948 0.4361714
## Misc-Action              0.76934961 -0.43244394  1.971143152 0.6282482
## Platform-Action         -1.19580368 -1.60969806 -0.781909291 0.0000000
## Puzzle-Action           -1.41815895 -2.10993210 -0.726385789 0.0000000
## Racing-Action           -0.46906199 -0.78838412 -0.149739871 0.0001014
## Role-Playing-Action     -0.07487650 -0.26698779  0.117234804 0.9823356
## Shooter-Action          -0.12913828 -0.28782707  0.029550506 0.2466424
## Simulation-Action        0.21893395 -0.11276073  0.550628630 0.5808685
## Sports-Action            2.08723366  1.80312157  2.371345756 0.0000000
## Strategy-Action          0.28432195  0.08562909  0.483014810 0.0001851
## Fighting-Adventure       0.30275206 -0.38326830  0.988772414 0.9550915
## Misc-Adventure           1.50722089  0.26196055  2.752481237 0.0043855
## Platform-Adventure      -0.45793239 -0.98488036  0.069015579 0.1631941
## Puzzle-Adventure        -0.68028766 -1.44508548  0.084510157 0.1381736
## Racing-Adventure         0.26880929 -0.18762495  0.725243536 0.7436330
## Role-Playing-Adventure   0.66299479  0.28448144  1.041508135 0.0000007
## Shooter-Adventure        0.60873300  0.24603790  0.971428098 0.0000027
## Simulation-Adventure     0.95680524  0.49163112  1.421979355 0.0000000
## Sports-Adventure         2.82510495  2.39257138  3.257638510 0.0000000
## Strategy-Adventure       1.02219324  0.64029737  1.404089103 0.0000000
## Misc-Fighting            1.20446884 -0.13072109  2.539658760 0.1242894
## Platform-Fighting       -0.76068445 -1.47464031 -0.046728588 0.0250624
## Puzzle-Fighting         -0.98303972 -1.88690614 -0.079173296 0.0195630
## Racing-Fighting         -0.03394276 -0.69756240  0.629676874 1.0000000
## Role-Playing-Fighting    0.36024273 -0.25240003  0.972885499 0.7455650
## Shooter-Fighting         0.30598094 -0.29701701  0.908978904 0.8867404
## Simulation-Fighting      0.65405318 -0.01560776  1.323714114 0.0629585
## Sports-Fighting          2.52235289  1.87493951  3.169766273 0.0000000
## Strategy-Fighting        0.71944118  0.10470281  1.334179546 0.0073019
## Platform-Misc           -1.96515328 -3.22601900 -0.704287566 0.0000229
## Puzzle-Misc             -2.18750855 -3.56483346 -0.810183647 0.0000137
## Racing-Misc             -1.23841160 -2.47147300 -0.005350201 0.0478565
## Role-Playing-Misc       -0.84422610 -2.05061764  0.362165438 0.4856435
## Shooter-Misc            -0.89848789 -2.10001023  0.303034447 0.3759960
## Simulation-Misc         -0.55041566 -1.78673890  0.685907585 0.9522103
## Sports-Misc              1.31788405  0.09346849  2.542299620 0.0222078
## Strategy-Misc           -0.48502766 -1.69248476  0.722429444 0.9776541
## Puzzle-Platform         -0.22235527 -1.01230763  0.567597096 0.9989401
## Racing-Platform          0.72674168  0.22930701  1.224176359 0.0001151
## Role-Playing-Platform    1.12092718  0.69386584  1.547988524 0.0000000
## Shooter-Platform         1.06666539  0.65355915  1.479771639 0.0000000
## Simulation-Platform      1.41473763  0.90927151  1.920203748 0.0000000
## Sports-Platform          3.28303734  2.80743843  3.758636245 0.0000000
## Strategy-Platform        1.48012563  1.05006343  1.910187822 0.0000000
## Racing-Puzzle            0.94909695  0.20432666  1.693867249 0.0018611
## Role-Playing-Puzzle      1.34328245  0.64355184  2.043013062 0.0000000
## Shooter-Puzzle           1.28902066  0.59771877  1.980322556 0.0000001
## Simulation-Puzzle        1.63709290  0.88693455  2.387251238 0.0000000
## Sports-Puzzle            3.50539261  2.77502567  4.235759542 0.0000000
## Strategy-Puzzle          1.70248090  1.00091477  2.404047023 0.0000000
## Role-Playing-Racing      0.39418550  0.05797211  0.730398890 0.0071124
## Shooter-Racing           0.33992371  0.02162381  0.658223608 0.0243837
## Simulation-Racing        0.68799594  0.25654021  1.119451682 0.0000123
## Sports-Racing            2.55629565  2.16024973  2.952341581 0.0000000
## Strategy-Racing          0.75338394  0.41336696  1.093400923 0.0000000
## Shooter-Role-Playing    -0.05426179 -0.24466914  0.136145562 0.9988116
## Simulation-Role-Playing  0.29381045 -0.05417546  0.641796347 0.1976051
## Sports-Role-Playing      2.16211016  1.85913737  2.465082943 0.0000000
## Strategy-Role-Playing    0.35919845  0.13436144  0.584035453 0.0000117
## Simulation-Shooter       0.34807223  0.01736153  0.678782936 0.0288765
## Sports-Shooter           2.21637194  1.93340924  2.499334646 0.0000000
## Strategy-Shooter         0.41346023  0.21641440  0.610506068 0.0000000
## Sports-Simulation        1.86829971  1.46221214  2.274387286 0.0000000
## Strategy-Simulation      0.06538800 -0.28627418  0.417050180 0.9999819
## Strategy-Sports         -1.80291171 -2.11009994 -1.495723477 0.0000000
ggHSD( TukeyHSD(steam_genre) , no = 1)
## Warning: `guides(<scale> = FALSE)` is deprecated. Please use `guides(<scale> =
## "none")` instead.

steam_reduced = read_csv("reduced_publishers_steam.csv")
## Rows: 10208 Columns: 5── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (3): title, Genre, Publisher
## dbl (2): user_id, playtime
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
ggplot(steam_reduced, aes(x=Publisher, y=log(playtime))) + geom_boxplot(fill="steelblue") + labs(x="Publisher",y="playtime") + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1))

# ANOVA in R
steam_publisher = aov(log(playtime)~Publisher,data=steam_reduced)
summary(steam_publisher)
##                Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## Publisher      23   4066  176.80   50.14 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   10184  35912    3.53                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
model.tables(steam_publisher, type = "means")
## Tables of means
## Grand mean
##          
## 2.157271 
## 
##  Publisher 
##     505 Games   Atari Bethesda Softworks  Capcom Codemasters Deep Silver
##         1.979   1.693              2.746   1.383       1.591       1.953
## rep   405.000 115.000            360.000 141.000     320.000     402.000
##     Eidos Interactive Electronic Arts Iceberg Interactive Kalypso Media
##                 1.939           1.648               1.287         2.101
## rep           227.000         641.000             150.000       118.000
##     Koch Media Microsoft Game Studios Paradox Interactive SCS Software    Sega
##         0.9671                  2.409               1.806        2.509   3.931
## rep   136.0000                666.000             308.000      171.000 555.000
##     Sony Online Entertainment Square Enix Take-Two Interactive Telltale Games
##                         1.726       1.742                 2.55           2.31
## rep                   154.000     418.000              2605.00         138.00
##         THQ Ubisoft Unknown Vivendi Games
##       1.302   2.173   1.775        0.6785
## rep 592.000 686.000 519.000      162.0000
##     Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment
##                                      2.097
## rep                                219.000
model.tables(steam_publisher, type = "effects")
## Tables of effects
## 
##  Publisher 
##     505 Games    Atari Bethesda Softworks   Capcom Codemasters Deep Silver
##       -0.1782  -0.4643             0.5885  -0.7744     -0.5659     -0.2043
## rep  405.0000 115.0000           360.0000 141.0000    320.0000    402.0000
##     Eidos Interactive Electronic Arts Iceberg Interactive Kalypso Media
##               -0.2186         -0.5091             -0.8704      -0.05582
## rep          227.0000        641.0000            150.0000     118.00000
##     Koch Media Microsoft Game Studios Paradox Interactive SCS Software    Sega
##          -1.19                 0.2514             -0.3509       0.3515   1.773
## rep     136.00               666.0000            308.0000     171.0000 555.000
##     Sony Online Entertainment Square Enix Take-Two Interactive Telltale Games
##                       -0.4308     -0.4149               0.3928          0.153
## rep                  154.0000    418.0000            2605.0000        138.000
##          THQ   Ubisoft  Unknown Vivendi Games
##      -0.8555   0.01585  -0.3828        -1.479
## rep 592.0000 686.00000 519.0000       162.000
##     Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment
##                                   -0.06053
## rep                              219.00000
TukeyHSD(steam_publisher)
##   Tukey multiple comparisons of means
##     95% family-wise confidence level
## 
## Fit: aov(formula = log(playtime) ~ Publisher, data = steam_reduced)
##

## Vivendi Games-Unknown                                            0.0000000
## Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment-Unknown                   0.9027914
## Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment-Vivendi Games             0.0000000
ggHSD( TukeyHSD(steam_publisher) , no = 1)
## Warning: `guides(<scale> = FALSE)` is deprecated. Please use `guides(<scale> =
## "none")` instead.

pc_data = read_csv("pc_sales.csv")
## Rows: 957 Columns: 6── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (5): Title, Platform, Genre, Publisher, Year
## dbl (1): Global_Sales
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
ggplot(pc_data, aes(x=Genre, y= log(Global_Sales))) + geom_boxplot(fill="steelblue") + labs(x="Genre",y="NA_Sales")

# ANOVA in R
pc_data$logSales = log( pc_data$Global_Sales )
pc_genre = aov(logSales~Genre,data=pc_data)
summary(pc_genre)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)    
## Genre        11  112.1  10.187   4.791 3.33e-07 ***
## Residuals   945 2009.5   2.126                     
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
model.tables(pc_genre, type = "means")
## Tables of means
## Grand mean
##           
## -2.692014 
## 
##  Genre 
##      Action Adventure Fighting  Misc Platform Puzzle Racing Role-Playing
##      -2.577     -3.08   -3.526 -3.06   -3.274 -3.686 -3.267       -2.292
## rep 165.000     65.00    6.000 24.00   11.000 25.000 58.000      104.000
##     Shooter Simulation Sports Strategy
##       -2.39     -2.404 -2.755   -2.859
## rep  147.00    115.000 49.000  188.000
model.tables(pc_genre, type = "effects")
## Tables of effects
## 
##  Genre 
##       Action Adventure Fighting    Misc Platform  Puzzle  Racing Role-Playing
##       0.1153   -0.3883  -0.8337 -0.3678  -0.5822 -0.9939 -0.5748       0.3995
## rep 165.0000   65.0000   6.0000 24.0000  11.0000 25.0000 58.0000     104.0000
##      Shooter Simulation   Sports Strategy
##       0.3023     0.2884 -0.06267  -0.1673
## rep 147.0000   115.0000 49.00000 188.0000
TukeyHSD(pc_genre)
##   Tukey multiple comparisons of means
##     95% family-wise confidence level
## 
## Fit: aov(formula = logSales ~ Genre, data = pc_data)
## 
## $Genre
##                                diff         lwr         upr     p adj
## Adventure-Action        -0.50360871 -1.20324881  0.19603140 0.4358403

## Sports-Racing            0.51211873 -0.41490164  1.43913910 0.8125083

## Simulation-Role-Playing -0.11110680 -0.75760288  0.53538928 0.9999916
## Sports-Role-Playing     -0.46219876 -1.29002737  0.36562985 0.8016310
## Strategy-Role-Playing   -0.56683206 -1.15068740  0.01702329 0.0665007
## Simulation-Shooter      -0.01388108 -0.60865578  0.58089362 1.0000000
## Sports-Shooter          -0.36497303 -1.15307199  0.42312593 0.9358212
## Strategy-Shooter        -0.46960633 -0.99561662  0.05640395 0.1337622
## Sports-Simulation       -0.35109196 -1.16614222  0.46395830 0.9613378
## Strategy-Simulation     -0.45572526 -1.02131678  0.10986627 0.2589438
## Strategy-Sports         -0.10463330 -0.87094708  0.66168048 0.9999992
ggHSD( TukeyHSD(pc_genre) , no = 1)
## Warning: `guides(<scale> = FALSE)` is deprecated. Please use `guides(<scale> =
## "none")` instead.

pc_reduced = read_csv("reduced_publishers_pc.csv")
## Rows: 631 Columns: 6── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (5): Title, Platform, Genre, Publisher, Year
## dbl (1): Global_Sales
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
ggplot(pc_reduced, aes(x=Publisher, y= log(Global_Sales))) + geom_boxplot(fill="steelblue") + labs(x="Publisher",y="NA_Sales") + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1))

# ANOVA in R
pc_publisher = aov(log(Global_Sales)~Publisher,data=pc_reduced)
summary(pc_publisher)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)    
## Publisher    15  170.4  11.357   5.217 7.18e-10 ***
## Residuals   615 1338.8   2.177                     
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
model.tables(pc_publisher, type = "means")
## Tables of means
## Grand mean
##          
## -2.52093 
## 
##  Publisher 
##     Activision  Atari Codemasters Deep Silver Eidos Interactive Electronic Arts
##          -1.95 -3.348       -3.44      -2.696            -2.813          -2.013
## rep      56.00 25.000       27.00      21.000            28.000         146.000
##     Focus Home Interactive Microsoft Game Studios Paradox Interactive Sega
##                     -3.181                  -2.65              -3.582 -2.1
## rep                 28.000                  29.00              23.000 33.0
##     Square Enix Take-Two Interactive    THQ Ubisoft Unknown Vivendi Games
##          -2.478               -2.103 -2.753  -2.534  -3.264        -3.013
## rep      21.000               44.000 29.000  76.000  22.000        23.000
model.tables(pc_publisher, type = "effects")
## Tables of effects
## 
##  Publisher 
##     Activision   Atari Codemasters Deep Silver Eidos Interactive
##         0.5711 -0.8266     -0.9188     -0.1754           -0.2923
## rep    56.0000 25.0000     27.0000     21.0000           28.0000
##     Electronic Arts Focus Home Interactive Microsoft Game Studios
##              0.5081                -0.6606                -0.1292
## rep        146.0000                28.0000                29.0000
##     Paradox Interactive    Sega Square Enix Take-Two Interactive     THQ
##                  -1.061  0.4213     0.04253               0.4182 -0.2317
## rep              23.000 33.0000    21.00000              44.0000 29.0000
##      Ubisoft Unknown Vivendi Games
##     -0.01307 -0.7428        -0.492
## rep 76.00000 22.0000        23.000
TukeyHSD(pc_publisher)
##   Tukey multiple comparisons of means
##     95% family-wise confidence level
##
